description_long: This is a round, shallow frying pan with a long, straight handle extending from one side. Inside the pan, there are two browned sausages and a sunny-side-up egg with a bright yellow yolk and white edges, suggesting a freshly cooked breakfast. The pan itself appears to be made of metal, likely steel or aluminum, with a matte gray finish and a slightly worn interior surface. The handle is solid, matching the pan's material, and is attached seamlessly without any visible grip covering or ergonomic shaping. The rim of the pan is straight and moderately thick, with no visible pouring spouts or reinforced edges. There are no visible brand logos, hanging holes, or decorative elements, and the bottom of the pan is not visible in these views.
description: A round metal frying pan with a long handle, containing two sausages and a sunny-side-up egg. The pan has a matte gray finish and a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The pan is seen from an angle showing the handle extending to the right, with the sausages and egg clearly visible inside.
description_view_1: A front-facing view with the handle pointing downward, highlighting the egg and sausages near the rim.
description_view_2: The pan is viewed from the opposite side, with the handle extending left and the food partially obscured by the pan's edge.
description_view_3: A direct view into the pan from above the handle, showing the arrangement of the sausages and egg most clearly.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, solid metal handle with no visible grip texture or ergonomic features.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, moderately thick rim with no pouring spouts or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Not visible in provided views; presumed smooth or plain.
